agent cli

terminal-first multi-agent cockpit — real Claude TUI front and center, thin file rail, tabs = projects · 7 slices · 2 shipped

Tab = project. Panes = agents, each in its own worktree. Real TUI everywhere. Ship config before code — build the Tauri app only against frictions the trials prove.

TrialsCockpit configBuild (endgame)Research🔒 launch blocker⊘ gated

Now

Rocks · foundational & risky

LR1 · Zellij cockpit spikeTrials
v0🔒

KDL layout in Ghostty: tabs per project (indx, brutal, prova, gripe), yazi file rail, claude/codex panes each in their own worktree. Zellij persistence — no tmux wrapper. The closest match to the stated experience.

Done criteria

One week of daily use across 2+ projects with 3+ agent panes; every friction logged in ERRORS.md/PARKED.md. Known criterion going in: does a TUI editor (micro/helix) satisfy the 'VSCode-look editor, sometimes' expectation, or does that friction alone justify the Tauri build?

decides R3
MR2 · Superconductor daily-driver trialTrials
v0

Already installed (super.engineering). Its workspace-tabs + worktree-per-task model is exactly the ask; its chat UI instead of the claude TUI is the open question. Closed source, v0.1.0 nightly.

Done criteria

Clear keep/kill verdict after real use: does losing the terminal CLI view actually hurt?

decides R3

Next

Rocks · foundational & risky

MP1 · Ship v0 cockpit configCockpit config
v0🔒

Winner of the trials becomes the shipped artifact: zellij KDL layout(s) + install script + README in this repo. Zero application code.

Done criteria

Fresh shell: one command → cockpit with 4 project tabs, agents running, surviving a restart.

Pebbles · features

SP2 · Worktree helperCockpit config
v1

One keystroke: new agent pane = git worktree add + claude launched inside it, named and disposable. The 'same repo, parallel tasks' half of the mixed workflow.

Done criteria

From any project tab: new-worktree-agent in <5s; cleanup command removes worktree + branch.

Later

Rocks · foundational & risky

XLR3 · Tauri 2 native harnessBuild (endgame)
v2⊘

The endgame, only if both trials fail on real frictions. Seed from hashmark's Tauri scaffold + Warp design spec (color algebra, fonts, 358 icons); new core = portable-pty → xterm.js; workspace tabs + worktree-per-task model stolen from Superconductor.

Done criteria

v0 scope written from the trials' logged frictions — not imagined features — before any code.

closes the gap no OSS app fills (native-light, real PTY, thin rail)

Pebbles · features

SP3 · Zed stripped fallback configCockpit config
v2⊘

Verified settings.json/keymap/tasks for Zed as window-per-project cockpit (no project tabs exist in Zed — top community request). Kept as documented fallback, not the main path.

Done criteria

Config documented in docs/; applied in <1h if ever wanted.

Sand · glue & polish

SS2 · Mine Superconductor bundle for UX patternsResearch
v2⊘

resources/super.engineering.app (GPUI, closed source) — settings keys already reveal the feature map: workspace tab placement, stacked shells, worktree sort, branch cleanup automation. Document what's worth stealing for R3.

✅ Shipped (2)
MS0 · Research: OSS landscape + Zed verificationResearch
v0

July 2026 survey: every purpose-built Claude Code GUI reimplements the UI, is deprecated, closed, or Electron-heavy. Zed: no project tabs, terminals die on quit, git panel single-repo. Zellij+yazi delivers ~90% of the spec at zero build cost.

Done criteria

Findings drove the trial-first roadmap; rejected options documented with reasons. ✓ 2026-07-07

SS1 · Repo + roadmap board + interactive cockpit demoCockpit config
v0

Private repo with rockmap vendored, this board, the Superconductor bundle in resources/, and an interactive HTML demo of the zellij cockpit experience.

Done criteria

Pushed to github.com/jpoindexter/agent-cli (private). ✓ 2026-07-07
